briefs.title: BC Liquor Licensing Rule Section 29 Repealed — What Liquor Licence Holders Need to Know
briefs.summary: BC has removed (repealed) Section 29 of the Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation, effective December 8, 2025. This section no longer exists in the rules, which may change certain requirements or permissions that previously applied to liquor licence holders in the province.
briefs.action_required: Review what Section 29 previously required your business to do, and confirm with the BC LCRB whether anything changes for your licence.
